description: AgentVeil MCP Toolbox exposes explicit AVP tools for reputation inspection, Runtime Gate evaluation, human approval routing, signed receipt retrieval, identity lookup, and audit verification. It does not intercept, monitor, or gate other MCP tools. Use agentveil-mcp-proxy when downstream MCP tool-call control is required. Local/full mode exposes 20 tools; hosted read-only mode exposes 8 tools.
